name: voyager-mvp
description: AI x human 跑团 voyage engine — emergent shipboard simulation anchored to a real historical voyage, narrated by an LLM, with Blades-in-the-Dark flashbacks and generated newspaper artifacts.

scripts.demo: node src/cli.js sail --to 1769-06-10 --seed 7 && node src/cli.js gazette --from 1769-04-13 --to 1769-06-10 --seed 7
